hero.lead: We design and build SaaS platforms, CRMs and digital products that grow with your business. No middlemen, just results.

values.heading: Principles that define us
values.v01Text: We don't ship anything we wouldn't use ourselves. The standard is always the highest.
values.v02Text: We're technology partners. We work side by side with you, not just for you.
values.v03Text: Modern technologies when they make sense. No hype, just measurable results.
values.v04Text: Architectures that grow from the first commit. No technical excuses for not scaling.
values.v05Text: The best solution is the simplest one that works. Unnecessary complexity is technical debt.
values.v06Text: We understand your business before writing a single line. The right problem first.

cta.heading: Have an idea? Let's make it real.
cta.subtext: No strings attached. Just an honest conversation about your project.

footer.tagline: B2B SaaS platforms, CRMs and scalable digital products. From Buenos Aires and Madrid for Latin America and beyond.

about.heading: About us
about.lead: We're a team specialized in transforming ideas into scalable digital platforms. Technology, strategy and execution since 2022.
about.historyP1: Founded in 2022, PairProgramming was born from the vision of creating digital solutions that truly matter. We started as a team of developers and grew into a full-stack development agency with presence in Argentina and Spain.
about.historyP2: Our name reflects our methodology: we work in tandem with our clients, ensuring that every step of development is transparent and collaborative.
about.step01Desc: We analyze your needs and goals to craft the right strategy.
about.step02Desc: We create intuitive interfaces and user experiences that convert.
about.step03Desc: We implement robust solutions with the best technologies.
about.step04Desc: We deploy and provide ongoing support to ensure success.

blog.heading: Articles & resources
blog.lead: We explore ideas, share learnings and analyze trends in software development, AI and technology.
blog.articleInSpanish: This article is available in Spanish.

portfolio.heading: Projects that speak for themselves
portfolio.lead: Every project is a story of digital transformation. Discover the cases where we turned ideas into platforms that work.

contact.heading: Let's talk about your project
contact.subtext: Have an innovative idea? Tell us about your project and let's work together to make it happen.

faqPage.heading: Frequently asked questions
faqPage.lead: Find answers to the most common questions about our services, process and methodology.
faqPage.contactText: We're here to help. Contact us directly and we'll answer all your questions.

portfolioHeader.lead: Explore our most outstanding projects. Each one represents real solutions we've developed with modern technologies and industry best practices.
